---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do today? What gets in your way? Be concrete — name
the workflow, the command, the tab.

## Proposed solution

Describe the simplest change that would solve the problem. UI sketches,
API shapes, or example commands are great here.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think of, and why is the proposal above better?

## Scope

- [ ] One-line config change
- [ ] New API endpoint / CLI subcommand
- [ ] New dashboard tab or pane
- [ ] New crate or major refactor
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Anything else

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, or constraints we should
know about before scoping the work.
